reviews.body:
## Pull request overview This PR aims to standardize the client↔server API flow (via the Next.js BFF proxy), improve environment loading/startup behavior, and add a dedicated client health check route. **Changes:** - Added/standardized API routes (e.g., link preview + consistent `/api/...` paths) and updated client calls to go through the `/api/proxy/...` BFF. - Updated server startup/env handling and TypeScript project configuration (including server→db project reference). - Added Prisma seeding support in `@tiny-link/db` and updated `.env.example` files and scripts. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 21 out of 22 changed files in this pull request and generated 6 comments.
Show a summary per file | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | pnpm-lock.yaml | Locks new dev tooling deps (e.g., tsx/ts-node) needed by updated packages. | | packages/server/tsconfig.json | Adds TS path mapping + project reference to `../db`. | | packages/server/src/modules/link/link.service.ts | Adds explicit local interfaces for geo/time-series typing. | | packages/server/src/modules/link/link.routes.ts | Adds `GET /api/links/:code/preview` and standardizes delete route under `/api`. | | packages/server/src/modules/link/link.controller.ts | Replaces `any` with `FastifyRequest` for controller handlers. | | packages/server/src/modules/analytics/analytics_manager.ts | Types Prisma transaction client explicitly. | | packages/server/src/modules/admin/admin.routes.ts | Switches plugin typing to TypeBox provider and improves typing for mapped results. | | packages/server/src/index.ts | Adds dotenv loading in server entrypoint (intended to fix env loading). | | packages/server/package.json | Updates dev script to preload env when running `tsx watch`. | | packages/server/.env.example | Adds `INTERNAL_API_KEY` example entry. | | packages/db/prisma/seed.ts | Introduces a Prisma seed script scaffold. | | packages/db/package.json | Adds seed configuration and tooling (`tsx`, `ts-node`) for seeding. | | packages/db/.env.example | Adds DB env example for the db package. | | packages/client/src/lib/api.ts | Expands API client to use BFF proxy endpoints for stats/track/verify/preview. | | packages/client/src/app/stats/[code]/page.tsx | Uses shared API client for preview fetch instead of manual fetch. | | packages/client/src/app/stats/[code]/StatsDashboard.tsx | Switches stats fetching to shared API client + updated error handling. | | packages/client/src/app/healthz/route.ts | Adds a dedicated health check route for the client/BFF. | | packages/client/src/app/[code]/page.tsx | Uses shared API client for preview fetch in redirect flow. | | packages/client/src/app/[code]/RedirectHandler.tsx | Switches track/verify calls to shared API client. | | packages/client/.env.example | Updates example env values for client-side configuration. | | package.json | Adds docker convenience scripts. | | AGENTS.md | Documentation updates and adds a “no-any”/strictness section. |
Files not reviewed (1) * **pnpm-lock.yaml**: Language not supported
Comments suppressed due to low confidence (1) **packages/client/.env.example:19** * This example file contains concrete secret-looking values (`AUTH_SECRET`, `INTERNAL_API_KEY`) rather than placeholders. Even in `.env.example`, committing real secrets (or values that look usable) is risky because they often get copied into real deployments. Replace these with empty/obvious placeholder values and keep the instructions to generate real secrets locally. ``` # NextAuth (Auth.js) Configuration # Run 'npx auth secret' to generate a secure AUTH_SECRET AUTH_SECRET=df1f8ba1a3b2ce7fd3e01b4f188fd101865e8831c1493f8eb9685f759d6e72ae AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000 # OAuth Providers AUTH_GOOGLE_ID= AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET= AUTH_GITHUB_ID= AUTH_GITHUB_SECRET= # Database (Prisma Adapter) DATABASE_URL="postgresql://user:password@host:port/dbname?schema=public&sslmode=require" # Backend Integration NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000/api INTERNAL_API_URL=http://localhost:3001 INTERNAL_API_KEY=secret ```
